item.title: When a noble female disciple gives food, Suppavāsā, she gives four things to the recipients. What four? She gives life, gives beauty, gives happiness, gives…
item.description:
When a noble female disciple gives food, Suppavāsā, she gives four things to the recipients. What four? She gives life, gives beauty, gives happiness, gives strength. Having given life, she has a share in life, whether celestial or human. Having given beauty, she has a share in beauty, whether celestial or human. Having given happiness, she has a share in happiness, whether celestial or human. Having given strength, she has a share in strength, whether celestial or human. This, Suppavāsā, is what a noble female disciple gives when she gives food: she gives these four things to the recipients.

Trích: Aṅguttara Nikāya 4.57
📖 Read this sutta
